hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$d = $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR; $ac = Join-Path $d '_bmad-output/active-context/active-context.md'; $rm = Join-Path $d 'docs/repo-map.md'; Write-Output '# clean-bmad continuity + gate (auto-injected at SessionStart)'; if (Test-Path $ac) { Write-Output '# BMAD active-context (sprint state):'; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 $ac }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output 'ARTIFACTS GATE: no edits outside _artifacts/ without an approved implementation_plan.md (AGENTS.md section 5). GIT: hand Daniel the exact command; never commit/push yourself unless he delegates it (git-policy).'; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '# Repo-map index (docs/repo-map.md) - your navigation map:'; if (Test-Path $rm) { Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 $rm }"
